EXPLANATION: The cited paper exists and is verified on arXiv under the title "TOMG-Bench: Evaluating LLMs on Text-based Open Molecule Generation". The automated checker's "actual" title and author list appear to be for a different or later version/submission of related work (Speak-to-Structure), but the cited title and authors are the correct metadata for the arXiv entry 2412.14642.

LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.14642
FOUND_TITLE: TOMG-Bench: Evaluating LLMs on Text-based Open Molecule Generation
FOUND_AUTHORS: Jiatong Li, Junxian Li, Yunqing Liu, Dongzhan Zhou, Qing Li

VERDICT: UNLIKELY
